IBEW.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Indoor Locals — Friday, July 10, 2026**

**LU-430 Racine, WI** is running hot on Microsoft Mount Pleasant with four contractors (Gerdes, Pieper, Staff Electric, Kelso Burnett) all posting at **$62.51/hr**—top scale work, long sleeves required, reciprocal cards welcome. This is clean steady data center gig territory with 11 calls and a shallow bench (76 hands board-wide), meaning Book 1 moves fast here.

**LU-481 Indianapolis, IN** has 41 calls across 204 hands, led by Meade Electric's Meta Data Center job in Lebanon offering **$53.80/hr + 10% over scale** on specific dates (July 15 & 20) for 5-12's. Google Mooresville through Ermco is all outside new construction—extensive background required. IU Hospital indoor AC work rounds the board.

**LU-26 Lanham, MD** sits on 43 calls (223 hands) but scale data missing in dispatch—the real play is FIS LLC and JE Richard pulling for Virginia data centers (Sterling, Manassas, Ashburn) with **$125/day per diem**, planned OT, and M-F (5) 8's plus 2 OT daily. Active Data Center work, customer background check needed.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** is holding 26 calls (130 hands) at Polaris Forge Data Center (Harwood) through Parsons Electric: **$44.80/hr + $100/day non-taxed per diem** Mon-Fri, bump to **$150/day Sat-Sun**, 6-10's, GPS radius 100+ miles. Hunt Electric's Grand Forks Air Base offers **$44.80/hr** on 4-10's with 8-hour Friday OT premiums.

**LU-1105 Newark, OH** (30 calls, 180 hands) runs THE SUPERIOR GROUP's Conesville power plant work: 4-10's + 1-8 start, 6AM call, most Saturdays. MID-CITY's various jobs pay all OT as double time on 6-10 schedules.

**LU-613 Atlanta, GA** (38 calls, 220 hands) features Inglett & Stubbs at QTS Fayette and Wellstar Paulding Hospital both **$40/hr**, optional Saturdays. Miller Electrical's cable splicer role hits **$40.90/hr** but demands 3 years documented splicing experience.

Data center builds continue absorbing the majority—Virginia, Indiana, Wisconsin, North Dakota—with per diem and OT premiums the real money drivers where scale is thin or held back.

LINEMAN.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Lineman Locals — Friday, July 10, 2026**

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** is running hot with 26 calls and ~130 hands needed. Parsons Electric's got 78 slots on the Polaris Forge Data Center in Harwood pulling **$44.80/hr** plus **$100/day per diem** on 6-10's—ND license reciprocated in 30 days if you're clean. Hunt Electric's offering **$44.80** at Grand Forks Air Base with Friday OT kicks on 4-10's. The real money's Apex Line Contractors' 6 journeyman slots at full scale **$58.50** and **$100/day incentive**, running 6-12's. Book depth's real here.

**LU-1547 Anchorage, AK** has 46 calls but only ~60 hands on the board—tightest ratio in this snapshot. Golden Valley's paying **$30.86/hr** for 8-week inventory work in Healy; Morley Electric's got 2 inside JW slots at Delta Junction with housing or per diem covered. New Horizons' wage scale swings wild (**$24.18–$55.06**) depending on experience across statewide locations.

**LU-291 Boise, ID** is a META play. VECA Electric's got 10 slots (day and swing) at **$65.33/hr** under the new MOU effective April '26—META's backing the scale. Lea Electric's Micron PLA work pays **$45.33** but adds **$20/hr travel pay** and **$170/day per diem** x 7 days if eligible. Quality Electric's St. Luke's tower work is **$55.33** on shop calls, 5-8's.

**LU-474 Memphis, TN** shows 44 hands for 3 calls—nearly clear. ArchKey's Google Data Center job (West Memphis) needs 38 inside JW's at **$36.65/hr** plus **$125/day incentive**, 4-10's and 2-8's mixed. Gephart's running 6-10's with double-time OT; R&W's on 5-12's with Saturday OT.

**LU-194 Shreveport, LA** is a FiberBond long call. Caddo and EMS both staffing 20 inside JW's each on 5-10's plus every other Saturday, adding 10% premiums.

Data-center infrastructure and fiber builds are pulling hands nationwide—this market's riding the AI buildout wave hard.
